sensitivity: Kellgren-Lawrence: 0.88; Joint Space Narrowing: 0.82; Osteophytosis: 0.89; Subchondral Sclerosis: 0.84
specificity: Kellgren-Lawrence: 0.87; Joint Space Narrowing: 0.87; Osteophytosis: 0.78; Subchondral Sclerosis: 0.87
intended_use: RBknee is a radiological fully automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of minimum jo
intended_use_full: RBknee is a radiological fully automated image processing software device of either computed (CR) or directly digital (DX) images intended to aid medical professionals in the measurement of minimum joint space width; the assessment of the presence or absence of sclerosis, joint space narrowing, and osteophytes based on OARSI criteria for these parameters; and, the presence or absence of radiographic knee OA based on Kellgren-Lawrence grading of standing, fixed-flexion radiographs of the knee.
ground_truth: Ground truth grading for Kellgren-Lawrence grades and OARSI criteria (osteophyte, sclerosis, joint space narrowing) and measurements of minimum joint space width established by two physicians following adjudication procedures with a third reviewer for discrepancies, using the Osteoarthritis Initiative database.
other_metrics: Minimum Joint Space Width measurement accuracy quantified by orthogonal linear regression: Medial slope 1.00 (95% CI 0.98-1.02), intercept -0.07 (95% CI -0.17 to 0.03); Lateral slope 1.00 (95% CI 0.97-1.03), intercept -0.10 (95% CI -0.27 to 0.06)
